concerns: Rolling window default of 50 is 2.5x the ProbeSampler window (20) — document the rationale in the ADR since resource entries arrive in bursts (page load) vs steady-state (probes), and confirm the eviction strategy handles burst patterns well

extractTimingEntry filtering to same-origin only is good defensive practice, but the filter logic needs to compare entry.name against window.location.origin — plan should clarify this uses URL comparison, not a Timing-Allow-Origin header check

The plan does not mention updating the existing NetworkSnapshot type or wiring collected entries into the snapshot flow — this is correct for US-008 scope (collection only) but the ADR should explicitly note that integration is deferred to US-009 to avoid confusion
